title: 11 Herbal Teas For Lice
description: Rosmarinus officinalis teas contains rosmarinic acid, carnosic acid, and camphor as its bioactive constituents. These compounds have antimicrobial and insecticidal properties that can help in treating lice infestations. Rosmarinic acid has been shown to inhibit the growth of lice eggs and kill the lice themselves. Carnosic acid has antioxidant properties that can help soothe the skin and reduce irritation caused by lice bites. The insecticidal properties of camphor help in killing lice...
